name: vapi-replay-proof-pipeline-helpers
description: Data Economy Arc 5 — node helpers for the VHR pipeline. Parallels bridge/vapi_bridge/zk_artifacts/ from Phase 237. Used by VAPIReplayProofPipeline's Groth16Prover to compute the two public Poseidon commitments (vhpCommitment + sanitizedTraceRoot) and assemble the snarkjs `groth16 fullprove` input.json. circomlibjs is the only runtime dep.
